identity.canonical_title: Cosmological Constant and Master Unification Equation

theory.canonical_statement: ID 400 establishes the cosmological constant and master unification equation as the handoff from TZP vacuum pressure residue into the registry's metric and stress energy chain. In this entry, Lambda is treated as an emergent residual vacuum pressure after topological equilibration at the Trawin Zero Point; the equation chain regularizes vacuum density against global topological and information constraints, leaving a small positive state pressure. It prepares ID 401, where the electromagnetic stress energy tensor converts that residue into momentum flux.
